source.notes: Identity cleared manually because the Stacker wiki page also documents Unloader variants and raw import can capture the wrong prefab.

modeValues.settingInterpretation: Automatically stacks and exports items according to Setting.
Stacks and holds items until Output or Activate is triggered.

parameters.name: Activate
parameters.description: If set to 1, the Stacker will clear its content via its Export Slot without regard to the Setting

parameters.name: Lock
parameters.description: Locks the device for player interaction when set to 1. Unlocks it when set to 0.

parameters.name: Setting
parameters.description: Default is 1. Sets the Stack Size (won't actually stack to that size if item's max stack size is smaller)

parameters.name: On
parameters.description: Turns the stacker on when set >= 1. Turns it off when set < 1.

parameters.name: ClearMemory
parameters.description: Resets ImportCount and ExportCount to zero.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: Value of 0 for Mode 0. If you set this to 1 while in Mode 1 the stacker will export a batch of items from storage with quantity Setting. If there are not enough items in storage, they will not be output.

outputs.name: Mode
outputs.description: Returns the current stacker mode. See modeValues.

outputs.name: Lock
outputs.description: Returns whether the stacker is locked.

outputs.name: ImportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack enter by the Import slot

outputs.name: ExportCount
outputs.description: Incremented each time an item stack exit by the Export Slot

outputs.name: Error
outputs.description: Returns whether the stacker is reporting an error.

outputs.name: Activate
outputs.description: 1 if empty, 0 if something is inside the Stacker. When set to 0 The player can use the lever to clear the Stacker

outputs.name: Setting
outputs.description: Default is 1. Shows the Stack Size this Stacker is set to.

outputs.name: RequiredPower
outputs.description: In watts. The Stacker requires 5W to operate.

outputs.name: Power
outputs.description: Returns whether the stacker is powered and turned on.

outputs.name: Output
outputs.description: Value of 0 in Mode 0. Mode 1 sets this to -1.

outputs.name: On
outputs.description: Returns whether the stacker is turned on.
